unresolved_questions: ARX is described as 'The Game Changer' for maritime operations and a news headline titles it 'swarm-controlling UAS' (skipped URL), but no fetched page provides full specs or category confirmation beyond its listing under Platforms.
No NDAA or Blue UAS claims found anywhere in the corpus for any product.
Individual product detail pages for AR3, AR5, ARX, and ATLAS were all skipped due to budget exhaustion; full specifications, payload configurations, and compliance claims are unavailable.

fetch_requests.reason: Primary product detail page for AR5 — would provide full specs, payload options, and any compliance/NDAA claims.
Primary product detail page for AR3 — would provide full specs, variants, and any compliance/NDAA claims.
Primary product detail page for ATLAS — would confirm whether it is ground segment software/service or has hardware components, and clarify readiness.
ARX product page (linked as the ARX platform from nav and Platforms page) — needed to confirm category, specs, and production status of ARX.
News article revealing ARX as a swarm-controlling UAS — would clarify whether ARX is primarily an airframe or has EW/C2 capabilities affecting category classification.
Would provide strong production readiness evidence for AR3 (10,000+ operational flight hours cited in headline).
